name: @quoin/tokens-primer
description: GitHub Primer (light theme) palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Primer base/color/light/light.json5 extracted byte-faithfully. The json5 source nests hex inside `$value.hex`; the primer-json5 parser walks the indented tree and emits `base.color.{family}.{step}: '#hex'`. Extraction method: A. Mapping: Primer 10-step scales for gray/blue/green/red/orange/yellow/purple/pink/coral. Functional mapping: surface = white, text = gray.9, accent = blue.5 (Primer's --color-accent-emphasis), critical = red.5, success = green.5, warning = yellow.5, info = blue.5.
